executiveSummary: A markdown-first notebook that syncs across devices and supports first-class linking, offline-first behaviour, and full-text search.
problemStatement: Knowledge workers maintain notes across many tools; cross-tool linking, search, and offline access are unsolved. The available alternatives either lock data into proprietary formats or fall over on poor-connectivity workflows.
objectives: Capture is friction-free; new note in under 200 ms
Retrieval beats a 10-second target on a corpus of 10000 notes
Offline-first by default; no online dependency on the read or write path
Open data format; user can export the entire corpus as plain markdown
constraints: Single-developer maintenance budget for the first 12 months
Server-side runtime limited to Cloudflare Workers (cost ceiling)
